narrative:
Tallmadge 3-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,085 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
